overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter video game depicting a student character in a green hooded robe ascending a stone spiral staircase within a gothic castle interior, joining other students, and entering a domed chamber with an ornate wooden door. The environment features medieval stone architecture, marble columns, hanging tapestries, and warm lantern lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle spiral staircase with marble columns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the stone spiral staircase alone, passing ornate marble columns and wall lanterns

entered.detail: wide curving stone steps ascending through the castle
tall green marble pillar with carved decorative capital
decorative arched recess in the stone wall
lit wall-mounted lantern casting warm orange light
long vertical hanging banner with intricate designs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed spiral staircase within a gothic castle. The character walks up stone steps flanked by ornate marble columns on the right and stone walls with hanging tapestries and lit wall sconces on the left. The environment is empty of other people, with warm artificial lighting illuminating the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic staircase with prominent hanging tapestries

events.description: another student in black robe appears walking ahead on the stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing up the spiral stairs, following behind other students in black robes

notable_agents.action: student in black robe walking up the stairs ahead of ego

entered.detail: large vertical banner depicting a dragon in red and white colors

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the spiral staircase, now following other students in black robes. A large dragon tapestry becomes visible on the left wall as the group climbs higher. The stone architecture remains consistent with ornate columns and warm lantern lighting, while the crowd density shifts from empty to sparse.

scene_state.functional_zone: domed chamber with ornate wooden door and skylight

events.description: exits narrow staircase into open domed chamber with skylight above

agents.ego_description: entering the domed room and walking toward the large ornate wooden door at the far end

notable_agents.action: student approaching the wooden door ahead of the group

entered.detail: circular room with high vaulted ceiling and central skylight
large carved wooden door with metal accents and circular window
decorative treasure chest with metal bands against the wall
large green fern plants in stone planters
wall sconce burning with magical green fire

segments.scene_description: The group exits the narrow staircase into a spacious domed chamber illuminated by a skylight above. The room features an ornate carved wooden door at the far end, a stone chest, potted ferns, and a wall torch with green magical flame. The character walks across the patterned stone floor toward the door, following the other students.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a narrow gothic staircase into the expansive light of a domed castle chamber. It begins with a lone character ascending stone steps flanked by ornate marble columns and lit wall sconces, moving through a quiet, enclosed space. As the climb continues, the environment shifts from solitude to a shared journey as the character follows other students past a large dragon tapestry hanging on the stone wall. The scene then opens wide as the group exits the spiral ascent and enters a spacious hall illuminated by a bright overhead skylight. Finally, the camera tracks across a patterned stone floor past potted ferns and a green magical flame toward an ornate carved wooden door at the far end of the room.
